_instructions: Copy this file as <experiment>_prereg.json. Fill all fields. Commit BEFORE running the experiment (the commit timestamp is the registration). Reference this prereg in the paper's Methods section.

falsification_criteria.primary_fails_if: <specific outcome that would reject the primary hypothesis>

sample_size.justification: <why this n — power analysis, prior effect sizes, practical constraints>
sample_size.conditions: <breakdown: N conditions × M items × K repeats = total>

analysis_plan.null_model: <what the 'no effect' comparison is — permutation, matched Gaussian, Marchenko-Pastur, etc.>
analysis_plan.multiple_comparisons: <correction method if applicable — Bonferroni, BH-FDR, family-wise max-over-layers permutation>
analysis_plan.error_bars: <bootstrap CI, cross-probe dispersion, etc. + acknowledge autocorrelation if present>

threats_to_validity: <each known threat, with why it matters and how it's mitigated or disclosed>
what_would_change_our_mind: <the single most important thing a skeptic would point to>

gate_requirements.pre_run: Agni-scaffold + Claude design review (APPROVED or CONDITIONAL-with-fixes-applied before GPU)
gate_requirements.post_run: verify-paper numerical trace on any claimed numbers before publication

connection_to_prior_work: <what this builds on, what it extends, what it would change if it succeeds or fails>
